name: tricli-remote
description: Remote control for Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor Agent across Web and Android.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check apps/server/server.js && node --check apps/daemon/daemon.js && node --check apps/web/app.js && node --check packages/core/protocol.js && node --check packages/core/adapters.js && node --check packages/core/codex-app-server.js && node --check packages/core/claude-stream-json.js && node --check packages/core/cursor-stream-json.js
scripts.check:mobile: cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit --jsx react-jsx --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target es2020 --allowSyntheticDefaultImports --skipLibCheck App.tsx src/*.ts
scripts.check:all: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm run check:mobile && npm run smoke
